tool_args.label: MTA REAL ESTATE FINANCE COMMITTEE AGENDA ITEMS - MAY 2024

payload.title: Real estate action items
payload.description: MTA Finance Committee agenda items for May 2024 covering administrative and transactional real estate action items including the Metro-North Claremont Substation Project eminent domain process, lease agreement with Gotham Market Bites Corp. for 2 Broadway retail space, amendment to license agreements with Compass Group USA for vending machines, and permanent easement with Tarrytown Municipal Housing Authority.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
entity.office is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Office names are relation context unless the source treats the office as the entity.
entity.organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organization names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.description: Demolition of existing vacant building and construction of a new electrical substation to strengthen the traction power system on the Harlem Line. Existing equipment at substations in Melrose and Tremont are overloaded and located too far apart. Includes installation of feeders to the existing third rail and local utility infrastructure.

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.
project.implementing_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Implementing agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: EDPL Public Hearing - Claremont Substation Project

payload.description: MTA held an EDPL public hearing to describe the public use, benefit and purpose of the Claremont Substation Project and its general impact on the environment. Notices were published in newspapers. Property owners were given advance notice by mail. MTA and C&D representatives attended.

tool_args.label: Written Submission Deadline - Claremont Substation Project

payload.description: Deadline for written comments about the Claremont Substation Project and/or proposed property acquisition, ending at 5:30 p.m.

tool_args.label: MTA Board Approval - Claremont Substation Project

payload.description: The MTA Board approved the acquisition of property interests by eminent domain or otherwise for the Metro-North Claremont Substation Project.
Estimated time frame when property interests would be needed for the Claremont Substation Project.
Finance Committee meeting to approve agenda items including Claremont Substation Project, Gotham Market Bites lease, Compass Group license amendment, and Tarrytown easement.
MTA Board meeting to approve agenda items including Claremont Substation Project, Gotham Market Bites lease, Compass Group license amendment, and Tarrytown easement.
MTA Real Estate issued a Request for Proposals for street-front retail space at 2 Broadway.

tool_args.label: Appraisal of 2 Broadway Premises by Goodman Marks

payload.description: MTA Real Estate solicited an appraisal from Goodman Marks for the 2 Broadway premises, appraised at $210,000.00 per annum.
Appraisal of the Tarrytown Easement Area completed, valued at $120,000.

tool_args.label: Explanatory Statement Submitted to NY State Officials

payload.description: Explanatory Statement for disposal by negotiation of MNR real property was submitted to appropriate New York State officials pursuant to Section 2897(6)(d) of the Public Authorities Law.
Starbucks' lease for the street-front retail space at 2 Broadway expired.

payload.claim_text: The Project is planned to strengthen the traction power system on the Harlem Line. Existing equipment at substations in Melrose and Tremont are overloaded and located too far apart. The Project's objective/benefit is to build a new substation in Claremont to increase the load capacity of the traction power system to improve service reliability.
payload.subject: Metro-North Claremont Substation Project

tool_args.label: SEQRA Exemption for Claremont Substation Project

payload.claim_text: The Project is exempt, pursuant to New York State Public Authorities Law 1266(11), from the requirements of New York State Environmental Conservation Law Article 8 (SEQRA) because the affected property is contiguous to land used for transportation, the Property is less than ten acres in area, and the acquisition will not change the general character of the prior transportation use.
payload.subject: Metro-North Claremont Substation Project

tool_args.label: Gotham Market Bites Corp. Selected as Lessee

payload.claim_text: MTA Real Estate has identified Mr. Ayman Alzandani of Gotham Market Bites Corp as the most compelling candidate overall for the retail lease at 2 Broadway. His proposal stands out for strong financial reserves, extensive retail experience in Manhattan, and innovative concept. Credit and background investigations found no evidence of criminal conviction history, very good credit and sufficient financial resources.
payload.subject: 2 Broadway retail lease
payload.existing: Previously occupied by Starbucks, whose lease expired on December 29, 2023

tool_args.label: Compass Micro-Market Revenue Share Reduced to 0%

payload.claim_text: After further discussions with Compass, it was mutually agreed that reducing the revenue share from 10% to 0% would render the micro-markets financially viable and provide ample opportunity for Compass to increase the number of facilities with micro-markets. Eliminating the revenue share at the micro-markets is expected to have a minimal impact on compensation due to the MTA considering the total number of new micro-markets will remain small.
payload.subject: Compass Group USA license agreements
payload.proposed: Revenue share reduced from 10% to 0% for micro-markets
payload.existing: Existing micro-markets with 10% revenue share at Gun Hill Bus Depot, Eastchester Bus Depot, and College Point Bus Depot

payload.claim_text: TMHA is requesting to enter into a permanent easement for a portion of MNR's property. The Easement Area will be used for vehicle parking by the tenants of TMHA's adjacent apartment complex. TMHA is seeking to legitimize their ongoing use of the Easement Area since neither party could locate or verify any documented rights of use.
payload.subject: Tarrytown permanent easement

tool_args.label: Public Comments Requesting Repair of Existing Harlem-Line Substations

payload.claim_text: At the public hearing, the following summarizes the comments received: Requesting the repair of existing Harlem-Line Substations in the Bronx.
payload.subject: Claremont Substation Project public hearing comments
